---
title: "symmetric"
generated: true
description: "Average `X` with its transpose across the named axes."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.linalg.matrix`](../nitrix-linalg-matrix.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:symmetric -->
```python
symmetric(X: Num[Array, '... i i'], *, skew: bool = False, axes: Tuple[int, int] = (-2, -1)) -> Num[Array, '... i i']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:symmetric -->
Average `X` with its transpose across the named axes.

Returns the symmetric part $(X + X^{\top}) / 2$ of the square
block, or its antisymmetric part $(X - X^{\top}) / 2$ when
`skew` is set.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:symmetric -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `X` | `Num` | `...` × `i` × `i` | — | Tensor with a square block at the named axes. |
| `skew` | `bool` | — | `False` | If `True`, antisymmetrise ($(X - X^{\top}) / 2$) instead of symmetrising. |
| `axes` | `Tuple[int, int]` | — | `(-2, -1)` | The two axes defining the square block. Defaults to the trailing two axes. |

**Returns** `Num` — shape `...` × `i` × `i`. The symmetrised (or antisymmetrised) tensor, of the same shape as `X`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:symmetric -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `i` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
